title: CBP Frame Export Envelope (v0.5)
description: Canonical shape returned by GET /v1/frame/:id/export and accepted by POST /v1/frame/:id/import. Uses raw CbpNode and CbpEdge shapes — no resolver-computed fields (e.g. edge.active). The nodes and edges arrays must round-trip byte-identically under canonicalize() (RFC 8785) across an export -> import -> export cycle.

frame_id.description: Human-readable frame identifier matching the configured frame's id.

exported_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the export. Provenance only — not part of the byte-identical round-trip guarantee.

nodes.description: Every node whose lineage chain terminates at the frame root. Stored shape, not resolved shape.

edges.description: Every edge whose src node is in the frame. Stored shape, not resolved shape: no 'active' field.
